---
title: "match_histogram"
generated: true
description: "Match the intensity histogram of `moving` to that of `reference`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.preprocess`](../nitrix-metrics-preprocess.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:match_histogram -->
```python
match_histogram(moving: Float[Array, '...'], reference: Float[Array, '...'], *, bins: int = 256) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:match_histogram -->
Match the intensity histogram of `moving` to that of `reference`.

Remaps the intensities of `moving` by quantile transport so that its
distribution matches `reference`'s.

The fMRIPrep `--use-histogram-matching 1` step for within-modality stages:
each moving intensity is mapped to the reference intensity at the same
quantile (CDF transport), so the two images share an intensity distribution
and an SSD / CC metric is not pulled off by a global gain / offset.

Implemented by interpolating `moving` against the two images' quantile
curves (`bins` quantiles each) -- differentiable, `O(N log N)` (the
quantile sorts), paid once before the pyramid.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:match_histogram -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `moving` | `Float` | `...` | — | Image to remap. |
| `reference` | `Float` | `...` | — | Image whose distribution is matched (the registration `fixed`). |
| `bins` | `int` | — | `256` | Number of quantile knots in the transport map (default `256`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The remapped moving image, with the same shape as `moving`, whose intensity distribution matches that of `reference`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:match_histogram -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
